verses.1: Why do you boast of mischief, mighty man?
verses.3: You love evil more than good,
verses.5: God will likewise destroy you forever.
verses.6: The righteous also will see it, and fear,
verses.7: “Behold, this is the man who didn’t make God his strength,
verses.8: But as for me, I am like a green olive tree in God’s house.
verses.9: I will give you thanks forever, because you have done it.
